message:
refactor(types): eliminate redundant copies in Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> conversions crate-wide

After the SqliteValue::Text/Blob migration from owned String/Vec<u8> to
Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]>, many call sites were converting via intermediate
borrows (Arc::from(s.as_str()), Arc::from(v.as_slice())) which forces a
fresh heap allocation + memcpy even when the source is an owned String
or Vec<u8>. The standard library's Arc::from(String) and Arc::from(Vec)
reuse the existing heap buffer via String->Box<str>->Arc<str> and
Vec->Box<[u8]>->Arc<[u8]>, avoiding the redundant copy.

This commit updates ~80 call sites across 25 files:

Production code:
- fsqlite-types/value.rs: From<String>, From<Vec<u8>>, apply_affinity
- fsqlite-func/builtins.rs: char, concat, concat_ws, hex, replace,
  quote, substr, soundex, unistr, format (11 functions)
- fsqlite-ext-json: json, json_extract, json_arrow, json_value_column,
  json_to_sqlite_scalar, json_array, json_object, json_quote, json_set,
  json_insert, json_replace, json_remove, json_patch, json_pretty
- fsqlite-ext-misc: decimal_add/sub/mul, uuid, uuid_str
- fsqlite-ext-icu: icu_upper, icu_lower
- fsqlite-ext-rtree: geopoly test helpers
- fsqlite-ext-session: ChangesetValue::decode, test literals
- fsqlite-c-api: emit_exec_callback_rows, sqlite3_column_text
  (also fix .clone() -> .to_string() for Arc<str> and blob iteration)
- fsqlite-cli: SqliteValue::Text construction, sql_literal blob iter
- fsqlite-wasm: js_value_to_sqlite_value, sqlite_value_to_js,
  date_to_sqlite_value
- fsqlite/compat/params.rs: u64/usize overflow text fallback
- fsqlite/compat/row.rs: FromSqliteValue for String/Vec<u8>
  (.clone() -> .to_string()/.to_vec())
- fsqlite/migrate.rs: schema_migrations insert
- fsqlite-harness: bloodstream String8 decode, differential_v2
  NormalizedValue conversion

Test / E2E code:
- fsqlite-types/value.rs: 20+ test functions updated from
  String::new()/to_owned()/vec![] to Arc::from()
- fsqlite-e2e: comparison, fsqlite_executor, comprehensive_bench,
  7 integration test files updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,8 +109,8 @@ fn fsqlite_query_values(conn: &fsqlite::Connection, sql: &str) -> Vec<Vec<SqlVal
                     fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Null => SqlValue::Null,
                     fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Integer(v) => SqlValue::Integer(*v),
                     fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Float(v) => SqlValue::Real(*v),
-                    fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Text(v) => SqlValue::Text(v.clone()),
-                    fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Blob(v) => SqlValue::Blob(v.clone()),
+                    fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Text(v) => SqlValue::Text(v.to_string()),
+                    fsqlite_types::SqliteValue::Blob(v) => SqlValue::Blob(v.to_vec()),
                 })
                 .collect()
         })
